overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dystopian urban environment at dusk. The journey transitions from a construction-lined street through dark service alleys and industrial backways, past glowing digital billboards and steam vents, emerging onto a graffiti-covered street with towering corporate skyscrapers.

events.description: approaching and entering narrow alleyway entrance from main street

tall modern glass and steel skyscraper towering above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dystopian city street at blue hour, with the player walking past construction barriers and industrial equipment. A construction worker stands near a narrow alley entrance ahead, while neon signs and elevated highways frame the scene against a darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service alley and underpass between buildings

events.description: entering dark tunnel-like underpass with minimal ambient lighting
emerging from darkness into illuminated plaza with bright digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow dark passage between concrete walls toward the light of an open plaza

large digital advertisement screen displaying EZYBEEF burger commercials
digital billboard with TOUGH MORNING? text and product advertisement

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark, enclosed alleyway and underpass, transitioning from the lit street to near-total darkness before emerging into a small plaza dominated by massive glowing digital billboards advertising food and products.

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past shipping containers and industrial equipment, observing the large digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a commercial plaza dominated by massive digital billboards, then turns into a narrow service alley filled with steam vents, shipping containers, and industrial scaffolding.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with overhead scaffolding and utility pipes

events.description: exiting covered walkway into more open industrial yard area

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow industrial passages with overhead metal beams and steam pipes

large diameter industrial pipes running along the alley walls
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The player traverses a covered industrial backway with extensive metal scaffolding overhead and large utility pipes, eventually emerging into a more open industrial yard with concrete barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with graffiti art and towering corporate architecture

events.description: encountering group of pedestrians walking along the graffiti-covered street

massive futuristic skyscraper with red and black facade details
tall chimney emitting dark smoke against the evening sky
tall street lamps illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the industrial alleys onto a wider urban street featuring extensive graffiti art on concrete walls. Several pedestrians walk along the street as massive corporate skyscrapers tower overhead, with industrial smokestacks visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a construction-lined city street into the depths of industrial back-alleys before emerging into a towering corporate district. It begins at blue hour, moving past construction barriers and neon signs toward a narrow alley entrance. As the camera enters a dark underpass, the oppressive shadows give way to a sudden burst of light in a commercial plaza dominated by massive, glowing digital billboards. The scene then shifts back into the industrial gloom, weaving through steam vents and metal scaffolding under a covered backway before opening into a concrete yard. Finally, the camera emerges onto a wide urban street where graffiti-covered walls lead the eye upward toward massive corporate skyscrapers and distant smokestacks.
